title: selaginella mayeri
intro: Selaginella mayeri, also known as the 'Mayer's Spikemoss', is a species of evergreen plant in the Selaginella genus, belonging to the spikemoss family. Traditionally used in herbal medicine, Selaginella mayeri is valued for its potential medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. Its health benefits are thought to include reducing oxidative stress and improving cardiovascular health, although more research is needed to confirm these claims. Selaginella mayeri is typically prepared as a herbal tea or infused into oils, with some practitioners also using it in topical applications to promote skin health and reduce inflammation.
